nasb.text: Then Moses said, “What if they will not believe me or listen to what I say? For they may say, ‘The Lord has not appeared to you.’ ”

esv.text: Then Moses answered, “But behold, they will not believe me or listen to my voice, for they will say, ‘The Lord did not appear to you.’”

cnv.text: 摩西回答：“看哪，他們必不信我，也不聽我的話；因為他們必說：‘耶和華並沒有向你顯現。’”

ccb.text: 摩西回答说：“他们不会相信我或听我的话，他们会说，‘耶和华根本没有向你显现。’”
